dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9755 IH: Biotechnology Diplomacy Leadership Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. McCormick (for himself and Mr. Bera) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Foreign Affairs

form.official-title: To establishes a new position of Senior Biotechnology Official within the Department of State to enhance United States leadership in global biotechnology challenges by leading United States efforts in biotechnology diplomacy, security, and innovation, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Biotechnology Diplomacy Leadership Act of 2026.

subsection.text: Not later than 90 days after the date of the enactment of this Act, the Secretary of State shall appoint an individual to the position of Senior Biotechnology Official to enhance United States leadership in biotechnology diplomacy, innovation, and security by working closely with other United States departments and agencies involved in biotechnology.
The individual appointed pursuant to subsection (a) shall—

paragraph.text: possess significant expertise in biotechnology, international relations, and diplomacy; and

subparagraph.text: leading or coordinating international biotechnology initiatives;
managing complex projects related to biotechnology;
navigating the intersection of biotechnology and national security; and
managing interagency and international collaborations on biotechnology-related issues, with a focus on national security.

subsection.text: Under the supervision of the Secretary of State, the Senior Biotechnology Official shall lead and coordinate the Department of State’s efforts, in collaboration with other relevant Federal officials, offices, and agencies, related to—

paragraph.text: supporting and advising the Secretary of State regarding issues related to biotechnology, including the intersection of biotechnology with national security, global economic development, and global partnerships;

leading United States diplomatic and policy efforts related to international cooperation on activities to promote and protect United States priorities and interests in emerging biotechnology and national security, including coordinating biotechnology policy and initiatives with foreign governments, international organizations, private sector entities, and relevant stakeholders to advance global biotechnology innovation and security;
representing the Department of State in international biotechnology discussions, working groups, forums, and initiatives to advocate for United States policy and priorities in biotechnology;
working with United States agencies to align and leverage biotechnology-related resources and funding for international partnership and collaboration;
overseeing the implementation of United States commitments to international biotechnology initiatives, including—

subparagraph.text: promoting joint research and development; and
supporting capacity-building programs in partner nations; and

paragraph.text: providing regular reports to the Secretary of State regarding the status of international biotechnology diplomacy efforts, including the progress and outcomes of biotechnology initiatives, partnerships, and any emerging issues or opportunities in the global biotechnology landscape.

subsection.text: As used in subsection (a)(5), the term implementation includes—

paragraph.text: fulfilling obligations under international agreements and frameworks;
advancing shared objectives with allied and partner nations;
contributing to multilateral forums and working groups;
coordinating technical assistance and capacity building;

subsection.text: In addition to the responsibilities set forth in subsection (a), the Senior Biotechnology Official may also be tasked with any other duties that the Secretary of State determines are necessary—

paragraph.text: to advance Department of State goals; and
to further the objectives of United States biotechnology diplomacy.
